title: Create: Drinks
description: Adds juices to the game using the Create Mod.
body:
#
Create: Drinks
Adds drinks to the game using the create mod. It adds apple juice, carrot juice, chorus fruit juice, glow berry juice, melon juice, sugarcane juice, and sweet berry juice. All of the juices are crafted by pressing one of the fruits with one sugar which gives one bottle's worth of fluid except for sugarcane juice which doesn't require extra sugar. To put the fluid in a bottle you need to use a spout. Sugarcane juice removes Weakness and Mining Fatigue, while Glow Berry juice grants the Glowing effect.
